meta.name: PERMA Profiler
meta.description: The PERMA Profiler is a 23-item well-being measure based on Seligman's PERMA model, assessing Positive Emotion, Engagement, Relationships, Meaning, and Accomplishment.
meta.author: Butler & Kern (2016)
meta.reference: Butler J, Kern ML. The PERMA-Profiler: A brief multidimensional measure of flourishing. International Journal of Wellbeing. 2016;6(3):1-48.
meta.instruction: Please rate each of the following questions on a scale from 0 to 10 based on your honest feelings.

questions.text: How often do you feel positive?
How often do you become absorbed in what you are doing?
How often do you feel loved?
How often do you feel that what you do in your life is valuable and worthwhile?
In general, to what extent do you feel contented?
To what extent do you generally feel you have a sense of direction in your life?
To what extent do you receive help and support from others when you need it?
How often do you feel you are making progress towards accomplishing your goals?
How often are you able to handle your responsibilities?
In general, to what extent do you feel excited and interested in things?
In general, to what extent do you lead a purposeful and meaningful life?
In general, to what extent do you feel that what you do in your life is engaging?
How satisfied are you with your personal relationships?
How often do you achieve the important goals you have set for yourself?
In general, to what extent do you feel that you have a sense of purpose?
How often do you feel anxious?
How often do you feel angry?
How often do you feel sad?
In general, how would you say your health is?
How satisfied are you with your current physical health?
Compared to others of your same age and sex, how is your health?
To what extent do you feel lonely in your daily life?
In general, to what extent do you feel happy?

ranges.label: Low Well-being
ranges.description: Your overall PERMA score is low, suggesting significant room for improvement in well-being. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try keeping a daily gratitude journal to cultivate positive emotions
Seek activities that fully engage your attention and skills
Consider professional counseling for support
Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging

ranges.label: Moderate Well-being
ranges.description: Your well-being is at a moderate level, with some dimensions having room for growth. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Focus on improving dimensions where you scored lower
Strengthen social connections and relationship quality
Identify sources of meaning and purpose in your life
Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

ranges.label: High Well-being
ranges.description: Your overall well-being is high, with balanced development across dimensions. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Helping others can further enhance your own well-being
Continue monitoring balance across all dimensions
Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others

positive_emotion.label: Low
positive_emotion.description: You experience few positive emotions in daily life. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

positive_emotion.label: Moderate
positive_emotion.description: You experience some positive emotions, with room for growth. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

positive_emotion.label: High
positive_emotion.description: You frequently experience positive emotions, feeling joyful and content. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning
